text:
Market today: Chips are bouncing back strongly, led by Nvidia's stake in Nebius and Micron's recovery. This is the real driver for your concentrated tech book.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL (down 37.71%) and SPAL is a TRIM (down 48.51%) due to their leveraged nature and significant losses. QQQI is also a TRIM (down 2.09%).

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA's scanner setup (entry 206.47-206.24, stop 205.57) given the news.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged chip positions and watching for opportunities in the sector's bounce.
plays: SOXL: SELL/TRIM - significant loss on leveraged ETF, consider reducing exposure.
SPAL: SELL/TRIM - deep loss on leveraged ETF, consider reducing exposure.
NVDA: WATCH - scanner setup (entry 206.47-206.24, stop 205.57) aligns with news, consider if it breaks out.
